'''Dachat''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the area of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] containing the [[Hyabb-Twith Corridor]]. The [[Nelori Marauders]] had a base on the planet which allowed them to prey upon both the populations on [[Hyabb]] and [[Twith]]. The base was destroyed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[4050 BBY]].<ref name="TOTJC">''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
